title: ToolTreaux Stainless Steel Scissors 5.5 Inch Straight Blade Blunt Point Edge
description:
The ToolTreaux scissors feature super-sharp 5.5” blunt point straight blades that are ideal for precision cutting. You can count on them to cut through tougher materials like thick fabric, cardboard, and construction paper unlike other scissors of the same size. Our scissors come with ergonomic and smooth finger holes to provide comfort and prevent slippage during use to protect your hands from injury while cutting. They weigh just .08lbs so you can easily store them inside your pocket, toolbox, tool belt, or crafting kit for on-the-go use. Made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel, these scissors won’t rust to ensure a longer service life than other standard shears. Utilize them for a variety of applications like tailoring, sewing, hobby projects, crafting, and more!

ToolTreaux Stainless Steel Scissors 5.5 Inch Straight Blade Blunt Point Edge

The ToolTreaux scissors feature super-sharp 5.5” blunt point straight blades that are ideal for precision cutting. You can count on them to cut through tougher materials like thick fabric, cardboard, and construction paper unlike other scissors of the same size.

Key Features

  • BLUNT POINT STRAIGHT BLADES - ToolTreaux scissors feature blunt point straight blade edges ideal for sharp and precise cutting. Cut through tough materials like thick fabric and construction paper
  • COMFORTABLE GRIP - Scissors provide an ergonomic comfortable grip to prevent slippage during use and protect your hands from injury while cutting
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - Scissors come with 5.5” blades and weigh just .08lbs; easily store them inside of your pocket, toolbox, tool belt, or craft storage organizer when not in use
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won’t rust to ensure a long service life; utilize these shears for a variety of applications including tailoring, crafting, hobby projects, and more
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: stainless steel; Dimensions: Overall length 6.5”, Blade length 5.5”; Weight: .08lbs (1.28oz); Blade type: blunt point straight edge; Can cut through thick materials

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT55INCSSSC
  • UPC: 810058487438
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 6 in
